title: Categorical Encoding Tips for Business Users
summary: Messy category labels split bars and break filters. Light encoding cleanup pays off.

content.summary: Messy category labels split bars and break filters. Light encoding cleanup pays off.

body.text: CRM exports mix Active, active, and ACTIVE—three bars for one truth. Standardize case and trim spaces upstream when possible. Map deprecated values to current taxonomy in a reference sheet before upload.

body.alt: Data visualization on a modern display
body.caption: Data visualization on a modern display. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Standardize case and trim spaces upstream when possible.
Map deprecated values to current taxonomy in a reference sheet before upload.

items: Document approved enum values for status fields.
Filter legacy labels out or remap consistently.
Avoid free-text categories for KPI dimensions.

body.text: Clean categories produce readable bars and trustworthy Talk to Data answers.
Saved rules can exclude legacy values until source systems catch up.
Datilio preview helps spot category splintering before you chart.

meta_description: Messy category labels split bars and break filters. Light encoding cleanup pays off.
